get.summary: Get all companies to which the specified user belongs.
get.description: If no user is specified, will return all companies associated with the current user.

get.summary: Get company information by company ID.
Get document by exact document name.
get.description: This API can only be called by company admins. Use the `name` field for the exact document name string.

post.summary: Add one or more global permissions to company user or team.
post.description:
List of global permissions to grant. See [Onshape Help: Global Permissions](https://cad.onshape.com/help/Content/Plans/global_permissions.htm#Assignin) for details on each of the available permissions. 
 * `0`: Manage role based access control 
 * `1`: Manage users, teams, and aliases 
 * `2`: Enterprise administrator 
 * `3`: Permanently delete 
 * `4`: Analytics administrator 
 * `5`: Invite guest users 
 * `6`: Create projects 
 * `7`: Approve releases 
 * `8`: Enable link sharing 
 * `9`: Create releases 
 * `10`: Allow access to the App Store 
 * `11`: Create documents and folders in the Enterprise root 
 * `12`: Allow access to public documents 
 * `17`: Manage non-geometric items 
 * `18`: Manage workflows 
 * `19`: Transfer documents out of Enterprise 
 * `20`: Sync to Arena 
 * `21`: Create tasks 
 * `22`: Manage standard content metadata 
 * `23`: Workspace protection permissions 
 * `24`: Import files 
 * `25`: Use revision tools  * `26`: Export files

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User ID or Team ID, depending on `type`

delete.summary: Remove global permissions for a company user or team.
delete.description: Clear all or some of a user's global permissions

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User ID or Team ID, depending on `type`

parameters.name: permission

post.summary: Add a user to a company.
Update the company's information for a user.
post.description:
Returns updated company user info. `globalPermissions` field is deprecated. Please use the following: 
* [addGlobalPermissionsForIdentity](#/Company/addGlobalPermissionsForIdentity) 
* [clearGlobalPermissions](#/Company/clearGlobalPermissions)

delete.summary: Remove a user from a company, company teams, and all the direct shares.

previous.description: URI for previous page of the resources.

scopes.OAuth2ReadPII: Application can read your profile information
scopes.OAuth2Write: Application can write to your documents
scopes.OAuth2Delete: Application can delete your documents and workspaces
scopes.OAuth2Purchase: Application can request purchases on your behalf
scopes.OAuth2Share: Application can share and unshare documents on your behalf

scopes.document.edit: Atlas Application can edit a document
scopes.document.delete: Atlas Application can delete a document
scopes.document.read: Atlas Application can read a document
scopes.enterprise.create: Atlas Application can create an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.read: Atlas Application can read from an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.edit: Atlas Application can edit an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.delete: Atlas Application can delete an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.member.create: Atlas Application can create an enterprise member
scopes.enterprise.member.read: Atlas Application can read the details of an enterprise member
